de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation

Class SLResolverManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLResolverManager
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    JMLResolverManager

    public abstract class SLResolverManager
extends Object
    Resolves property calls of any kind. Keeps a list of resolvers doing the actual work, and a stack of namespaces to deal with several levels of local variables (e.g. "self", or iterator variables in forall() or select() subtrees).

    • Field Summary

      Resolves arbitrary property calls.
      private SLExpression resolveExplicit(SLExpression receiver, String name, SLParameters params)
      Tries to resolve a name as a property call on an explicitly given receiver, by calling the registered resolvers.
      private SLExpression resolveImplicit(String name, SLParameters parameters)
      Tries to resolve a name as a property call on any available implicit receiver.

      Helper for resolve().

      • resolve

        public SLExpression resolve(SLExpression receiver,
                   String name,
                   SLParameters parameters)
                     throws SLTranslationException
        Resolves arbitrary property calls.
        Parameters:
        receiver - the specified explicit receiver, or null
        name - name of the property
        parameters - actual parameters of the property call, or null
        Returns:
        corresponding term, type or collection if successful, null otherwise
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException
